programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Everyone loves a cocktail party—especially when you infuse the menu with the intoxicating aroma of wood smoke. Check out these smokehouse recipes inspired by the world's diverse cuisines from Spain to Australia and exploding with unique flavors. (S2 E11)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Good things may come in small packages, but when it comes to barbecue, bigger is better. Learn to think (and smoke) big with oversized cuts of meat, a whole suckling pig, and an epic dessert. (S2 E12)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Did you ever wonder what goes into making a TV show like Project Smoke? Come behind the scenes for a unique look at how we bring the show to life, from building the set to smoking the food. Plus, get the inside scoop on never before seen recipes, some of our favorite dishes, and other smoky surprises. (S2 E13)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: A show devoted to the most awesome cut of meat to grill: steak. Up first, a magisterial Wood-Grilled Beef Tomahawk Steak topped with Pt. Reyes Blue Cheese Butter. Followed by a four-finger thick Cherry-Smoked New York Strip Steak. Then a plancha-seared "steak" from the sea: Bacon-Wrapped Albacore Tuna "Filet Mignons" sauced with Peppercorn Cream Sauce. (S3 E01)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: A show to stoke our insatiable appetite for fiery foods, starting with smoky Nashville Hot Wings. From rural Kentucky come smoky grilled pork shoulder steaks to dunk in incendiary vinegar cayenne pepper sauce. For more pain, we present Piri Piri Prawns grilled in the shell with a distinctive hot sauce, followed by Indian Tandoori Lamb served with Hell's Fury Hot Sauce and cucumber yogurt raita. (S3 E02)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Fresh local fish hits the grill in this show, which is devoted to the art of grilling seafood. Local Channel Island rockfish roasts on a Himalayan salt slab, served with Melon Mint Relish. Tuna steaks come spice-rubbed and grill-blackened, sauced with Cajun Remoulade. Next, fire-roasted shrimp with Deconstructed Pesto. And for smoked fish lovers, Alaskan king salmon smoked over maple wood. (S3 E03)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Poultry is one of the most versatile meats to cook over fire. From the Republic of Georgia comes tabaka, citrusy butterflied chickens grilled under a press with piquant Rhubarb Tkemali sauce. From Fez, grilled chicken and onion kebabs marinated in Charmoula. Pound cake gets the grill treatment with fresh berry "salsa" and whipped cream. Finally, a smoke-roasted turkey with butter and truffles. (S3 E04)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Pan-Asian pit masters (and mistresses) developed a grill culture that celebrates the "fifth taste," umami. Striped bass is stuffed and grilled before it's doused with hot sesame oil. Thai Beef Salad is a mosaic of color and textures. Corn comes basted with sesame soy butter and finished with fire-toasted coconut. Last up, pounded chicken thighs get basted with Beijing Barbecue Sauce. (S3 E05)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Smoke is the soul of barbecue. In this episode, you'll learn how to smoke duck breasts. Cherry salsa underscores duck's affinity for fruit. Vegetarians and meat eaters will devour our cheese and bean-stuffed poblanos and smoked mushroom bread pudding. But if it's carnivores you're feeding, smoke a hefty awe-inspiring beef shoulder clod. A tangy mustard barbecue sauce makes the perfect complement. (S3 E06)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: In this "surf and turf" show, a marine biologist brings ocean-fresh sea urchins for Steven to grill. Local spiny lobster is split and roasted in the shell directly on the embers. Meanwhile, Alaskan king crab gets grilled and served with garlicky absinthe butter. Representing turf are bone-in veal chops blasted with rosemary smoke and beef plate ribs, spit-roasted on a wood-burning rotisserie. (S3 E07)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show goes whole hog! Up first, pastrami bacon made by brine-curing pork belly, rubbing it with a pastrami rub, and finally slow-smoking it over hardwood. Then an apple cider-based brine and rum-spiked finishing glaze pork chops. Next, "pork and beans" like you've never seen them. Finally, rings of sweet onions are doused with hot sauce, spiraled with bacon, and crisped over the fire. (S3 E08)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show celebrates the holy BBQ trinity of barbecue: pork ribs, brisket, and pulled pork. America's favorite ribs—baby backs—are glazed with an unexpected ingredient. Beef brisket and baked beans star in crispy grilled tostadas. An amazing BBQ Titans' brisket with espresso in the barbecue sauce. Finally, pulled pork marinated in an umami-rich Korean chili paste called gochujang. (S3 E09)

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Its bright but complex flavors and affinity for smoke and fire have fueled the obsession with Mexican food and drink north of the border. Tomatoes, onions, and chiles are roasted in the coals to make an unforgettable salsa. Quesadillas conceal a perfectly cooked egg. Then, a Grilled Nopalitos Corn Salad and chipotle-marinated pork tenderloin. To finish, pineapple slices flambéed with mezcal. (S3 E10)

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: After 10 years of service, Maxi bids farewell to full-time lifeguarding to pursue his childhood dream of becoming a firefighter. programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Lifeguards search for a couple who have been washed off rocks by a large wave. Joel rescues a family of four in the flagged area. programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Reidy is haunted by the memory of a man drowning in the south corner as he rescues two swimmers in the same spot. A woman suffering from heatstroke loses her 3-year-old son. Bluebottles invade Bondi, and Jesse and Hoppo engage in a mass rescue where people are pushing each other under.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A swimmer in trouble refuses rescue. Faddy deals with reports of a motionless man on the sand. Bagus races out to help a lifesaver tangled in rescue equipment ropes. Reidy and Corey look after two drunk girls who find it difficult to stand up.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Tragedy unfolds as a Chinese backpacker is left comatose after-hours. A father loses his son in a massive crowd. Lifeguards struggle communicating with the distressed Cambodian man. programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Harrison's life is threatened when he tries to save a brother and sister whose panicked state leads them to start drowning their rescuer.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: When a backpacker has a violent seizure for over 15 minutes, team leader Beardy fears long-term consequences. In the water, Sam attempts a daring move during a dangerous rescue, while fellow rookie Luke swallows his pride after an embarrassing blunder.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Riding on the jet ski, Reidy spots a shark off Bondi. As more shark sightings are reported by beachgoers, lifeguards sound the alarm. Later Jake must retrieve a dead body, it's an emotional job in a tough season for the young lifeguard.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Heidi Klum joins Bondi's celebrity roll call. But will the lifeguards look up to scratch when they appear in her latest photo shoot? programme.title: Bondi Rescue

programme.title: Smoke, Lead, and Alcohol
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy venture into one of the city's most dangerous neighborhoods, only to find a debtor ready to defend his ride by pumping it full of lead, with no concern for who gets caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Fuming over Froy's departure, Matt loses his temper on a dominatrix and her client and packs his bags to return to LA.? Down two repo men, the pressure is on Ronnie and Carlos, who interrupt a couple in the middle of their less-than-holy matrimony.

programme.title: This Is No Fantasy
programme.desc: First, Froy and Lyndah get a tip from a spotter that leads them to a late model sedan with cans tied to the bumper and an angry bride in the passenger side. Next, Matt has to step in when Froy starts to lose it with a group of fantasy football players. And finally, Sonia, Lyndah, Froy, and Lou are astounded when a loopy debtor douses his own car in gasoline and sends it up in flames.

programme.title: El Prisionero
programme.desc: Lou and his cousin Rob face trouble on the job when a debtor makes shocking claims to police about the newest member of the Pizarro clan. Plus, will a repossession from a well-connected socialite end with Matt and Froy riding into the sunset, or is somebody going to end up locked in a Mexican prison?

programme.title: Wrench in the Works
programme.desc: First, a wrench is thrown in the works, and at the car, when Froy and Matt try to repo from a plumber. Then, the duo go out again to try to repo a car from a slap-happy debtor, but unfortunately the car has a boot on it. And finally, Froy, Matt, Lyndah, and Sonia head out to the ranch to repo a tractor from some pushy ranch hands.

programme.title: Don't Spray Me with That
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy repossess an experimental concept motorcycle from a hose-wielding yuppie. Then, Froy and Sonia head to a casting agency to repossess a car from a two-faced receptionist with a special talent for four-letter words. And finally, Froy and Matt get way more than they bargained for when they try to repossess a van from an exterminator who is not afraid to unload his bug-killing spray on humans.

programme.title: Monster of a Problem
programme.desc: Lyndah and Matt confront a confused debtor who is as quick with his questions as he is with his knife. Then, Lou and Lyndah interrupt a seaside party to repo a motorboat away from a gaggle of misguided youths. And, Lou, Froy, and Sonia head to the dirt track to repossess a car from an event promoter. They seem to be able to reason with him, but his monster truck-driving brother with no respect for human life may prove to be a problem.

programme.title: Native Operation
programme.desc: First, Matt and Lou confront an ungentlemanly drunk at an upscale gentleman's club in an effort to repossess his late model BMW. Then, Sonia and Matt head over to the wrong side of the tracks to reclaim a motorcycle from a different kind of biker. And finally, Matt and Froy cross the border into a nearby reservation to wrangle with a belligerent debtor and two unimpressed representatives of the tribal police.

programme.title: The Dune Buggy
programme.desc: First, Lou and Froy tail an upper class debtor to an upscale restaurant where the food is almost as unpalatable as its clientele's attitude. Then, Lyndah and Froy head to a residential district to repossess a van that is busy being loaded up with stolen electronics by a dangerous pair of criminals. And finally, Matt and Froy head to the desert to sneak an extremely rare top-of-the-line dune buggy from a crew of dedicated off-roaders.

programme.title: Naked and Dangerous
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah try to repossess a hot tub away from a group of upset partiers. Then, Lou and Matt try to negotiate with a pair of unintelligible and enraged parade participants. And, Lou and Lyndah must repo a car from a group of old men.

programme.title: Tijuana Surprise
programme.desc: Matt and Froy's business hits another snag when a gang of bat-wielding partiers keeps them away from a car and a paycheck. Then, Lou and Sonia wind up in the crosshairs when they attempt to repo a car from a man who appears to be a federal agent. And, with Matt and Froy's business in a complete shambles, they go to work in the only place that can save them Tijuana.

programme.title: Rolling Away
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy have to push away a debtor while trying to push a classic car up a hill and onto the flatbed. And later, Matt and Froy head out on a repo for a BMW, but when the camera guy refuses to leave the car and Matt's lunch starts to get to him, things go terribly wrong in what could be the worst repo in the history of EGA Recovery.

programme.title: Sting Operation Blues
programme.desc: Sonia and Lou find themselves in the middle of nowhere in a tooth-and-nail fight with a trio of nerdy stargazers, Froy and Sonia find a cooperative old man to be a hassle after agreeing to let him get his stuff out of his cluttered car, and Lou and Matt go on a repo to interrupt a shady car sale and find themselves caught in the middle of an elaborate police sting operation.

programme.title: Boys with Toys

programme.title: Fake Or Fortune
programme.desc: A watercolour sketch thought to be by the British 20th-century sculptor Henry Moore was one of many artworks to have been looted by the Nazis from German museums in what they branded as degenerate art. Fiona Bruce and Philip Mould have been asked by the Museum of Fine Art in Bern, Switzerland, the owner of the piece, to investigate its provenance. They hope that their investigations will prove to the Henry Moore Foundation that the work is genuine.

programme.title: Fake Or Fortune
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and Philip Mould head to France to try to authenticate a batch of sketches and watercolours supposedly produced by a teenage Henri de Toulouse-Lautrec, works which had already been rejected by the Committee responsible for authenticating the work of Toulouse-Lautrec. They need to uncover proof which, they hope, will persuade the Committee to reassess their previous decision.

programme.title: Fake Or Fortune

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: Jamala Madikwe, Madikwe Game Reserve, North West Province
programme.desc: JAMALA MADIKWE, Sika's second Safari destination has been awarded “Most Romantic Lodge in South Africa” and is set around a Game-rich waterhole in the malaria-free Madikwe Game Reserve of the North West Province along the border of Botswana. Once an area consisting mainly of Cattle farms before it was transformed into a Wildlife Reserve in the early 90's. Today, the Reserve supports a thriving and incredible diversity of Species due to the fact that it lies in an ecological transition zone between the Kalahari and Lowveld Wilderness.

programme.title: Dawn to Dusk
programme.desc: Find out how one creature's tragedy is another's dinner in this marine climate.

programme.title: On Safari
programme.sub-title: The Outpost Lodge, Northern Kruger National Park, Limpopo Province
programme.desc: Sika's Safari Adventure starts in the Northern Kruger National Park in the Limpopo Province, where THE OUTPOST Lodge rests high on a hill encompassed by stunning vistas of the Luvuvhu River set in the Makuleke Region that falls in the epicentre of the Great Limpopo Park, which comprises Kruger National Park, the Gaza National Park in Mozambique and the Gonarezhou National Park in Zimbabwe. Designed by an Italian born architect, Enrico Daffonchio using simple, clean lines and combining elements of steel and canvas, the stunning contemporary design of this Luxury Kruger Park Lodge emphasizes its beautiful surrounds but blends in with the Wilderness that is it's home.

programme.title: The Business Angle

programme.title: The Latest in Ideas

programme.title: Best of the Best

programme.title: Procrastination Station
programme.desc: Fascinating ideas for when you should probably be doing something else. 1) How to make applying for jobs less painful | Priyanka Jain 2) The story we tell about millennials -- and who we leave out | Reniqua Allen 3) The future of machines that move like animals | Robert Katzschmann 4) Facebook's role in Brexit -- and the threat to democracy | Carole Cadwalladr 5) How to govern AI — even if it's hard to predict | Helen Toner

programme.title: The Future Ahead
programme.desc: Get an awe-inspiring look at the future that awaits with visionaries already predicting, embracing and innovating on the potential of tomorrow. 1) The billion-dollar pollution solution humanity needs right now | Stacy Kauk 2) The future of flying is electrifying | Cory Combs 3) Building the world's largest (and most controversial) power plant | Alex Gendler 4) How to build an equitable and just climate future | Peggy Shepard 5) 5 ethical principles for digitizing humanitarian aid | Aarathi Krishnan 6) How your body could become its own diagnostic lab | Aaron Morris

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hurricanes '07
programme.desc: We hope Season Two will give us the opportunity to make the quintessential Angry Planet show – a full episode exploring a major hurricane that makes landfall in Florida or the Carolinas.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Hurricane Triple Threat
programme.desc: Early September of 2008 saw radical imagery on the hurricane maps of the Atlantic – four named tropical storms, swirling in a train across the ocean. “Angry Planet” was there as three of them made landfall as hurricanes in the US. We filmed gustaf in Louisiana, Hanna in North Carolina, then flew with the USAF Hurricane Hunters into Ike over cuba, and met it again as it made a wild destructive landfall in Galveston, Texas.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Elephant Cave
programme.desc: Possibly the home of the deadly Marberg Ebola virus, Kitum Cave is high on Mt.Elgon straddling the Kenya-Uganda border. The deep, waterfall-shrouded cave has been carved out over millennia by elephants in search of salt. When host george kourounis gets bitten by one of the bats&mldr well, you'll have to see the show to find out what happens.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Eco-Disasters
programme.desc: No-one creates eco-disasters on quite the scale of the former Soviet Union. In Uzbekistan, the Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, has seen its waters diverted, so that it has shrunk to 1/6 its previous size. In Crimea, a mountain has been carved into a james bondian submarine base. In northern Ukraine, the Chernobyl nuclear site has been reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Costa Rica
programme.desc: Costa Rica is a tiny country jammed with diversity and adventure. George explores the volcanoes of Costa Rica with an international team of scientists, rafts down whitewater rivers in full flood, canyoneers down raging waterfalls, and handles some of deadliest snakes this tropical country has to offer.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Antarctica
programme.desc: George returns to the “Fin Del Mundo” at the southern tip of Argentina, this time to sail on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving the stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps out in the Antarctic snow, and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off the melting glaciers.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Arctic Winter
programme.desc: George links up with two experienced polar adventurers to explore the frigid Canadian arctic in the depths of winter. The team first uses skis to cross the fractured sea ice of Frobisher Bay, then dog teams to head north through the spectacular Auyuittuq Mountains.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Polynesian Volcanoes
programme.desc: Filming the volcanoes, mudpools and geysers in the geothermic wonderland of New Zealand's north island, we learn that a new island is being created by an undersea volcano 1000 miles north in Tonga. Determined to be among the first to see this “newest land on earth”, we head for the remote island by plane and boat, after various nautical mishaps, George ends up, bedraggled and clad in nothing but underwear and a lifejacket, honored to be one of the very first to explore this brand new island.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Highway to Hail
programme.desc: George and three side-kicks head straight into the “Bearcage”, looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones that Texas and Oklahoma can throw at them. They find it – and their stormchasing vehicles don't look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Space
programme.desc: We break the bounds of earth, and look at the environment of space. We examine the difficulties and challenges of exploring this most challenging environment.↵ ↵George experiences some of the extreme training needed for space travel –aboard a Czech-built Albatross fighter jet, the Zero-G plane, and a centrifuge producing 6 G's of force, and witnesses the launch of a flight to the International Space Station.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Under Pressure
programme.desc: It's dark, it's cold, there is no air to breath and everything is under extreme pressure. George begins his exploration of the deep with a well-preserved shipwreck in the st.lawrence River, then heads west to dive with undersea explorers Chris Harvey-Clark and Phil Nuyyton, and investigate the newly discovered “Black Smoker” deepsea vents. The show climaxes in Curacao, where we dive to 1000 feet aboard Nuyyton's newest submersible.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Crystal Cave
programme.desc: In 2000, a remarkable find was made in Chihuahua, Mexico, of a spectacular cave filled with giant crystals, some over 20 meters long. But it is a intensely difficult spot to explore – with temperatures over 50 degrees C and humidity well over 100%. George leads an Explorers Club Flag Expedition into the cave, wearing special refrigerated suits and respirators to battle the extreme environment.

O'Neal reconnects with an old flame, Karen Mellor (Sherry Stringfield), and finds gainful employment as a driver for an armored truck service. programme.title: The Green Inferno
programme.desc: New York college student Justine (Lorenza Izzo), a lawyer's daughter, meets a student activist named Alejandro (Ariel Levy) when he goes on a hunger strike on behalf of underpaid janitors. Smitten, Justine agrees to help Alejandro undertake his next project: to save the Amazon. She soon learns to regret her decision when their plane crashes in the Peruvian jungle and she and the rest of their group are taken captive by a tribe of hungry cannibals.

programme.title: The Hitcher II: I've Been Waiting

programme.title: Rainbow Reef Relaxation 2
programme.desc: Sit back, relax and enjoy the dazzling world of coral reefs in 4K you embark on a journey through some of the most vibrant underwater reefs on our blue planet - including many scenes which no longer look like this due to coral bleaching. From the cinematographer: "The footage for this film was shot over a period of some years in French Polynesia, Micronesia, Indonesia and East Timor. Unfortunately there are not that vibrant anymore today. Coral reefs have suffered from the rise of water temperature, rise in acidity, destructive fishing methods and severe storms caused by climate change." - Peter Schneider. "Rainbow Reef Relaxation" is a 3-hour long, sweeping yet majestic & vibrant underwater journey to the world's most beautiful lagoons, as captured by Nature Relaxation collaborator Peter Schneider (Underwatercam) paired with ambient underwater sounds and brand new ambient music by the Cynic Project. Filmed in High Definition several years ago, thanks to its age this film offers magical glimpses of an underwater world that is bursting with life, color, and beauty.

programme.title: Natural Beauty
programme.desc: Stumble upon the picturesque beauty of Hawaii's Pa'ako Cove, famous for its white sand beach and lava outcroppings.

programme.title: Winter Visions
programme.desc: Winter Visions — Step into a world where each artwork transports viewers to a whimsical realm where snowflakes dance & twinkling lights & laughter fills the air. The music in sets a groovy and euphoric holiday tone featuring flutes, bells, strings, and synth pads.

programme.title: New Year Cheer II
programme.desc: New Year Cheer E2 — Step into a world of dynamic artistry in the spirit of the new year with festive portrayals of hope, renewal, and optimism. The music is celebratory, featuring are electro and soft house with funk rhythms held by bass lines and energetic drums.

programme.title: Holiday Cheer In Motion
programme.desc: Holiday Cheer: In Motion E4 — Immerse yourself in the holiday spirit with our dynamic winter art collection, featuring mesmerizing motion art videos. These captivating works bring the magic of the season to life through ever-moving visuals, evoking a sense of wonder and enchantment.

programme.title: Shades Of Color: Seasonal Shades of Gold
programme.desc: Shades Of Color: Seasonal Shades of Gold E7 — Adorned in shimmering gold, the artwork radiates warmth and splendor, bringing a touch of luxury to your holiday celebrations, as they gleam with festive cheer and timeless elegance.

programme.title: Shades of Color: Seasonal Shades of White Silver & Gold
programme.desc: Shades of Color: Seasonal Shades of White Silver & Gold E1 — A stunning collection of white, silver, and gold artworks, showcasing elegance and refinement through minimalist and metallic tones. These pieces radiate sophistication, capturing the timeless beauty of light, texture, and form in a harmonious blend of hues.

programme.title: Holiday Cheer: Seasons Greetings
programme.desc: Holiday Cheer: Seasons Greetings E2 — Immerse yourself in a realm where the magic of the holidays materializes through vibrant brushstrokes and captivating photography. The music breathes new life into the sound of Christmas with groovy rhythms grounded by drum kits and funky basslines.

programme.title: Featured Artist: Andrew Soria's Cityscape Mementos
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E1: Andrew Soria's Cityscape Mementos — Explore Andrew Soria's mesmerizing digital photo collages in “Cityscape Mementos.” His unique artistic vision offers a fresh perspective on urban architecture and culture, inviting viewers to rediscover their own cities in a new light.

programme.title: Featured Artists: Erni Vales + Sam Heydt
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E3: Erni Vales + Sam Heydt — A fusion of the diverse artistic styles & visions of our featured artists. Erni Vales unleashes imagination with surreal creations that transport you to another world while Sam Heydt challenges perspectives with thought-provoking conceptual art.

programme.title: New Year Cheer III
programme.desc: New Year Cheer S1E3 — Celebrate the dawn of a sparkling New Year with elegant strokes of white, silver, and gold. The artwork create a harmonious symphony of sophistication and hope, radiating a sense of renewal and opulence.
